Container.Name: host-agent
Container.Overview:
Single-container host agent. Bundles node-exporter, cadvisor, smartctl-exporter, ipmi-exporter, nvidia-gpu-exporter, an adaptive Dell PowerEdge fan controller, and vmagent.
vmagent scrapes every sub-exporter on localhost and pushes samples via Prometheus remote_write. Set PROMETHEUS_REMOTE_WRITE_URL to your receiver's /api/v1/write endpoint (Prometheus, VictoriaMetrics, Grafana Cloud, Mimir, etc.); optional bearer or basic auth via the other PROMETHEUS_REMOTE_WRITE_* env vars.
external_labels.host is the box's kernel hostname, so the dashboard sees a new host the moment its first push lands — no central config changes needed.
Sub-exporters that need hardware not present on this host (ipmi-exporter without /dev/ipmi0, nvidia-gpu-exporter without nvidia-smi, fan controller without a Dell BMC) self-disable. Same image runs on Dell, Mac mini, plain Linux + Docker, or Unraid.

Config.Name: Host filesystem
Config.Description: Read-only view of the host filesystem. node-exporter reads /host/proc, /host/sys, /host/var/run/docker.sock, /host/var/lib/docker through this single mount — leave the default.

Config.Name: Host sysfs
Config.Description: Direct passthrough of /sys (read-only) so cadvisor can read /sys/fs/cgroup and enumerate Docker containers. --privileged alone is not enough — Docker still gives the container its own cgroup namespace. Leave the default.

Config.Name: Docker socket
Config.Description: cadvisor opens /run/docker.sock at this hardcoded path. Leave the default.

Config.Name: Containerd socket dir
Config.Description: cadvisor's docker factory also dials /run/containerd/containerd.sock — directory mount keeps the path stable. Leave the default.

Config.Name: Docker root
Config.Description: cadvisor reads per-container metadata from /var/lib/docker. Leave the default.

Config.Name: Host devices
Config.Description: Direct passthrough of host /dev. ipmitool and smartctl talk to /dev/ipmi0 and /dev/sd* / /dev/bus/0 directly — Docker doesn't auto-share host devices even with Privileged on. Leave the default.

Config.Name: State directory
Config.Description: Persistent state for the Dell fan controller's EWMA baseline (takes 24–48 h to learn) and the vmagent write-ahead log. Pre-filled; advanced field — no need to touch.

Config.Name: Prometheus remote-write URL
Config.Description: Where vmagent ships samples. Must end in /api/v1/write and the receiver must run Prometheus 2.33+ with --web.enable-remote-write-receiver (or any compatible target — VictoriaMetrics, Grafana Cloud, Mimir, Cortex). Required — vmagent self-disables if unset.

Config.Name: Prometheus bearer token
Config.Description: Optional. Sent as `Authorization: Bearer …` on every remote_write. Use this OR the username/password pair, not both.

Config.Name: Prometheus basic-auth username
Config.Description: Optional. Username for HTTP basic auth on the remote_write receiver. Mutually exclusive with the bearer token.

Config.Name: Prometheus basic-auth password
Config.Description: Optional. Password paired with the basic-auth username.

Config.Name: Skip TLS verify on remote_write
Config.Description: Set to 'true' if the remote_write receiver uses a self-signed cert. Leave blank otherwise.
